scripts.test: newman run collections/${{ values.name }}.postman_collection.json -e environments/dev.postman_environment.json --reporters cli,junit --reporter-junit-export reports/results.xml
scripts.report: newman run collections/${{ values.name }}.postman_collection.json -e environments/dev.postman_environment.json --reporters htmlextra --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/report.html && open reports/report.html
